subject: Cycle 1 — Pinging Bull, no new messages. All apps nominal.
body: Ran Cycle 1 at 2026-05-30T07:02Z. No new messages from Bull since last real messages on May 29 (floodclaims-phase4-done, ask-owl-priority). GitLab pulled and up to date. Monitor state: 15/17 apps up. Down: AI Widget, Gym Forge (unchanged). Standing by for Bull reply.
